welcome: Welcome to the Protect Your Body App!
description: Learn how to take care of, protect your health and body every day to live a life full of energy.
tip_1: Drink at least 2 liters of water daily to purify your body.
tip_2: Spend at least 30 minutes a day exercising or moving gently.
tip_3: Get 7-8 hours of quality sleep each night to fully recover your body.
